notes: v0.16.74 — Multi-fix patch. (A) MINI-BOSS HP BUFFS — turret × 1.5, rail × 1.6, queen × 1.4, splitter × 1.7 so each archetype actually survives long enough to express its mechanic. (B) RAIL SENTINEL PATTERN VARIETY — picks one of 4 patterns per cycle: SWEEP (spinning beam, 110 dps), CROSS (4-direction simultaneous, 140 dps), WHEEL (5-spoke star, 130 dps), ZIGZAG (oscillating beam, 95 dps). Phase 2 adds a paired beam to each pattern. Telegraph beams now show exact incoming geometry before they light. Damage roughly 2× the previous tickle. (C) CORE DEFENCE seekers DOUBLED in visual size (was 10–14 px, now 18–24 px) so they read clearly at arena zoom. (D) CORE DEFENCE HEALTH PICKUPS — 4 static caches at arena corners (+35 core HP each, one-time) + flying boost pickups spawn every 12 s wandering across the arena (+50 core HP, 8 s window). (E) PATH SELECT FIXES — node colours now match the actual in-rift display (combat = cyan, hazard = orange, etc), node TYPE LABEL shown above each icon so you read each stop at a glance, and the top/bottom path connector lines now actually pass through the first node icon instead of curving around it. Windows only.
